calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appeared for and with Robert Sommers (Trustee).

The Court stated the following tentative rulings: 1)The Court is inclined to continue the $2,000.00 monthly payment to Mr. Zeiler. 2)The Court stated that the burden of administrative expenses and the capital gain taxes should fall on the trust, not Mr. Zeiler. 3)The Court is approving the 1% annum fees to be paid quarterly, but not the $10,000.00 request for services provided from May 23, 2007 through October 23, 2007 by Mr. Sommers. 4)The Court denied the request to hire an investment advisor and pay him at the rate of 1.25% annual fee. 5)The Court will approve the $5,000.00 reimbursement to Ms. Gruenberg (paid to Mr. Barringer) and $1,000.00 (paid to Mr. Sommers)for a total of $6,000.00. Mr. Baringer and Mr. Sommers presented arguement on the fee request and the necessity of hiring an investment advisor. The Court ordered the amount of $5,000.00 for Mr. Sommers fees. The issue on hiring an investment advisor was taken under submission. The Court directed Mr. Barringer to prepare an order which is to include the language of the authority to hire an investment advisor.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Janet Pond CSR#5292. Bailiff: Stella Obi. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Continued To Oct-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2007 Continued To Oct-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DAVE BARRINGER, APPEARING FOR THE TRUSTOR
COUNSEL WILL FILE PETITION TODAY. THE BOND FOR MS. SUMMERS NOT FILED. MATTER TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.
JUDGE:JOHN DEARMAN, REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:M. LOOS

Petn. To Appoint Successor Trustee Of Test. Trust
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: James Barringer appearing for petitioner. There is no order in the file authorizing the amount of monthly payment to the beneficiary. The deceased trustee has paid $2,000.00 a month to the beneficiary without court order. Petition is granted. Bond is fixed in the amount of $600,000.00. Counsel will prepare the order. Court instructed the successor trustee to continue to pay $2,000.00 a month. Counsel will file a petition and give notice.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petn. To Appoint Successor Trustee Of Test. Trust
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Continued To May-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee Fo Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Off Calendar

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee Fo Testamentary Trust
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Apr-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allin Pierce, Jr. (Counsel for Richard Massa, Trustee (deceased)); James Barringer (Counsel for Robert Sommers, proposed Successor Trustee); Robert Sommers (proposed Successor Trustee, present in Court).

After some discussion concerning the death of the Trustee (and moving party herein) and the ramifications of the same with respect to the petition before the Court, the Court continued the hearing on the same to April 16, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Pierce time to amend his Petition and notice the same and allow Mr. Beringer to file a Petition.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
